texto: Your journey has molded you for your greater good, and it was exactly what it needed to be. Don't think you've lost time. There is no short-cutting to life. It took each and every situation you have encountered to bring you to the now. And now is right on time.
explicacao: Citação de Asha Tyson sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Your journey has molded you for your greater good, and it was exactly what it needed to be. Don't…” articula reflexao, journey, molded em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como viagem e reflexao.

frase_original: Your journey has molded you for your greater good, and it was exactly what it needed to be. Don't think you've lost time. There is no short-cutting to life. It took each and every situation you have encountered to bring you to the now. And now is right on time.
